name: Chaos Rush : Tower Defense
short_description: A tower defense game that follows the story of Kalidos, a mercenary nation during the sixth period of chaos.
detailed_description:
The story consists of the mercenaries of Kalidos receiving requests from various kingdoms on the continent and defeating various enemies in order to resolve the sixth period of chaos that has befallen the continent of Pradonia.

In addition to the basic tower tech tree, you can have fun playing using various game skills such as captain characters, mercenaries, magic, items, and objects.

Complete 30 stages and 60 missions.

Join us as we begin a long story that will continue through two expansion packs.

* This game can be played offline even without an online connection

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Vietnamese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
